description_long: This is a pair of industrial-style shelving units, each constructed with a robust metal frame and bright red shelves. The frames are made of dark, metallic beams with visible bolts at the joints, providing structural support and a rugged appearance. The shelves themselves are flat, rectangular, and evenly spaced, offering ample storage space for various items. Cross-bracing is visible on the back of each unit, enhancing stability and preventing sway. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making these shelves suitable for garages, workshops, or urban storage areas. The overall look is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A pair of industrial metal shelving units with red shelves and cross-braced backs, designed for sturdy urban storage. The open, robust frames and vivid shelving make them ideal for garages or workshops.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shelving units side by side, highlighting the open shelves and sturdy metal frames.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the shelves and the vertical alignment of the metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the cross-bracing on the back of each unit, emphasizing structural stability.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the shelves and the open, accessible design.
